name: Hocus Pocus
description: The Sanderson sisters fly again — Bette, Kathy, Sarah Jessica, and a 17th-century black cat.

questions.q: In what year was the original 'Hocus Pocus' released?

source.notes: Released July 16, 1993 by Walt Disney Pictures.

questions.q: Who plays the eldest Sanderson sister, Winifred?
Who plays Sarah Sanderson, the youngest of the witch sisters?
Who plays the middle sister, Mary Sanderson?
In which historic Massachusetts town is 'Hocus Pocus' set?
On what date in 1693 does the film's prologue take place?
What kind of animal is Thackery Binx cursed to spend three centuries as?

source.notes: Voiced by Jason Marsden in cat form; Sean Murray plays the human Binx.

questions.q: What is the name of Thackery Binx's younger sister, taken by the Sandersons in 1693?
What kind of candle, lit by a virgin on Halloween, brings the Sanderson sisters back?

source.original_a: A curse to be revived by a virgin lighting the Black Flame Candle
source.notes: Made of the fat of a hanged man, per the spellbook.

questions.q: What classic R&B song do the Sanderson sisters perform at the Halloween party?
choices: I Put a Spell on You

source.original_a: I Put a Spell on You

questions.q: What lullaby does Sarah Sanderson use to lure the children of Salem?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: composed for the film by James Horner with lyrics by Brock Walsh (not John Debney).

questions.q: What three items do the Sanderson sisters use to fly?
choices: A broom, a mop, and a vacuum

source.original_a: Brooms, mops, and a vacuum cleaner
source.notes: Winifred takes the broom; Mary the vacuum; Sarah the mop.

questions.q: Who plays Max Dennison, the teenage protagonist?
Who plays Max's little sister, Dani Dennison?

source.notes: Was 11 at the time; later starred in 'American Beauty'.

questions.q: What kind of undead minion is Billy Butcherson, Winifred's ex-lover?

source.notes: Played by Doug Jones; Winifred sewed his mouth shut after he 'flirted' with Sarah.

questions.q: What ultimately destroys the Sanderson sisters?

source.notes: They turn to stone and crumble at first light.

questions.q: Who directed 'Hocus Pocus'?

source.notes: Ortega also directed the High School Musical and Descendants franchises.

questions.q: What did Sarah Jessica Parker reportedly eat on camera as Sarah Sanderson?

source.notes: Parker has said she ate a small spider on set.

questions.q: On which streaming service did 'Hocus Pocus 2' (the 2022 sequel) debut?

source.notes: Premiered September 30, 2022; same three lead actresses returned.

questions.q: What item must the children steal from Winifred to defeat the witches?

source.notes: The spellbook (with one giant eye) is the witches' source of power.
